title: paul russells LED GLS - Dimmable Edison Screw Light, 14W 1521 Lumens E27 A70 LED Bulbs, 100w Equivalent, 2700K Warm White, Dimmer Standard ES Energy Saving Ceiling Lightbulbs, 2 Pack
features: [Buying Satisfaction] We Provide a 24 Months Replacement Guarantee. We are online 365 days to help you out. If you have any issues, please feel free to contact us as soon as you need.
[Quality Highlights] paul russells Dimmable LED bulbs are CE / UKCA certified and inspected carefully, made of premium materials (plastic and aluminium), which is safe and perfect for household use.

[New ErP Technology] Compliant to Governments New ErP requirements, this 14W bulb can replace the 100w bulb. It provides 1521 luminous fluxes, with less than a blink time to warm up to full brightness. The light will be both bright and comfortable for you without flickering.
[Wide Application] paul russells 2700K Warm Whie LED bulbs can be used in living rooms, kitchens, bedrooms , bathrooms, hallways or ceiling fixtures.
[Visual Impact] High colour rendering (CRI > 80+) provides vivid and natural smooth colour; beam angle of 180° degree provides a wide Visual. (Images are for illustration purpose only).
description: Product Description Key Feature Comforting Warm White Glow Wide Expansive Beam Angle Instant Illumination Perfect All Over the House Bedside Lamp Reading Lamps Ceiling Lamps Wall Lamp paul russells LED Dimmable Edison Screw Cap Light bulbs, Warm White Specification Highlights These LED Dimmable GLS E27/ES cap bulbs boast a powerful 1521 lumens of bright light, with a mercury-free make that makes them safe for home-usage. These are a perfect choice for thoroughly brightening up your home. Instant Ignition With these bulbs lighting up in less than 0.5 seconds, your house will be illuminated in the blink of an eye (quite literally!).
